title: Randomized Villager Names
description: A data pack that gives random names and titles to all villagers you trade with totaling over 3000 combinations.
body:
# 🎲 Randomized Villager Names
Whenever a villager is traded with for the first time, as long as they didn't have a name, a random name and title is given to the villager. Names are randomly selected from a list of sixty-four names and twenty-two titles, resulting in over 1000+ name combinations!

- Titles are chosen from potion effects, with twenty two total.
- Names are chosen from items with sixty-four total.

## Updates:
- V. 1.5 Adds eight additional titles based on effects, increasing the total number of combinations by over 500+.
  
- V. 1.6 Adds six additional names based on items, increasing the total number to 2100.
  
- V. 1.7 Changed the datpack description to fully fit on screen.
  
- V. 1.9 Adds 1000+ new name combinations, increasing the total number to 3120.
